description_long: This helmet features a sleek, angular design with a predominantly matte gray finish and bold geometric accents. The front is adorned with a prominent V-shaped motif and two diamond-shaped elements, one of which appears to be a decorative or functional button. The sides are equipped with thick, red-edged panels that add a futuristic, armored appearance. The rear of the helmet is smooth and rounded, with a central ridge running from front to back, enhancing its aerodynamic profile. A large, dark red visor wraps around the front and sides, providing full-face coverage and a high-tech look. The overall construction suggests a robust, protective item suitable for urban environments or high-speed activities.
description: A futuristic, matte gray helmet with angular geometric accents, a large red visor, and bold red-edged side panels.
description_view_0: Front view shows the V-shaped motif, diamond-shaped elements, and central button-like feature, with red-edged side panels visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the large, dark red visor wrapping around the front and sides, and the angular side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a smooth, rounded surface with a central ridge and the back of the red-edged side panels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the full-face red visor and side panel details.
